task_completion.description: Configure Screaming Frog to store cookies
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog 'Spider Configuration' window is open (typically under Configuration -> Spider -> Advanced tab) and the 'Store Cookies' checkbox is actively selected.

Screaming Frog main UI shows 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL input box at the top, and the main data pane shows crawled URLs and progress, indicating the crawl has successfully started or finished.

task_completion.description: Export the cookie inventory to the specified CSV path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Export' dialog box from Screaming Frog showing the file being saved as 'cookie_inventory.csv' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory, OR a file manager/terminal showing this file successfully created in that exact path.

task_completion.description: Create the summary text file in the specified reports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or vim) or terminal command showing the creation or saving of a file named 'cookie_summary.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Include the total number of cookies and at least one cookie name in the summary report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'cookie_summary.txt' are visible on screen and explicitly state the total number of cookies found (must be 1 or more) and list the name of at least one specific cookie.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface. The agent should not bypass the tool by using curl, python scripts, or terminal commands to fetch cookies.

integrity.description: The CSV file was generated by Screaming Frog, not manually fabricated
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV export should originate from Screaming Frog's export functionality (e.g., via the Cookies tab or Bulk Export menu). The agent should not be seen manually typing CSV headers and rows into a text editor.

integrity.description: The summary report contains genuine data from the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary report should contain actual numbers and a real cookie name derived from the crawl results, rather than generic placeholder text copied directly from the prompt (e.g., 'Total cookies: X, Cookie name: Y').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Export Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/cookie_inventory.csv. Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/cookie_summary.txt. Minimum expected cookies: 1. Note that Screaming Frog's 'All Cookies' export includes 7 columns total: Address, Cookie Name, Cookie Value, Domain, Expiration Time, Secure, and HttpOnly.
